sections.name: Fanatics Buying Pause — Major Business Update
items: Fanatics informed BnB of industry complaints about repack cards
They're reviewing their repack process
**Decision: All buying paused outside of Fanatics Collect**
This was a coordinated decision after talking with other partners
Fanatics sent PayPal payment for outstanding balance — accounts squared
They'll provide updates as things change
Impact: Sourcing pipeline narrowed significantly for repack inventory
eBay sourcing unaffected, Fanatics Collect still open
Need to monitor if other platforms follow suit

key_actions.description: Fanatics informed BnB of industry complaints about repack cards

sections.name: Key Findings from Research
items: **Sprout Social**: Not worth it ($199+/seat), recommended Buffer ($5-10/mo) or Later ($25/mo)
**Buyer time zones**: EST+CST = 65-75% of collectors, prime window Thu-Sat 7-10 PM EST
**Suppliers**: Fanatics dropped GTS + Magazine Exchange, only Southern Hobby + Peachstate remain authorized
**Pokemon**: Main blocker is distributors requiring brick & mortar; ACD Distribution most likely to accept online-only
**Competitor marketing**: Nobody runs sophisticated email automation; WeTheHobby = best overall marketing; abandoned cart/post-purchase flows = untapped
**SMS**: Only Layton has active SMS among top breakers; SimpleTexting has API (email support@simpletexting.net)
**SEO**: breaknbad.com severely underutilized, competitors also bad = first-mover opportunity

Priority logic: ⚡=P1, 🎧=P2, 📄=P3

sections.name: Decisions & Corrections
items: **Matthew frustrated with report-task automation taking too long** — built proper pipeline to prevent future fumbling
**Todoist script was missing update/add-comment** — earlier priority changes silently failed. Fixed.
**Report tasks should match review spreadsheet** — every report needs: file, PDF, Drive link, spreadsheet entry, Todoist task, audio if eligible
**No more markdown-only reports** — pipeline enforces PDF generation
**Priority scheme for reviews**: ⚡ Action Items = P1, 🎧 Audio = P2, 📄 Full Report = P3
**Morning brief is mandatory** — can't be skipped with HEARTBEAT_OK
**Every new task must have a due date** — no undated tasks going forward

sections.name: Fanatics Collect Pipeline
items: **Full pipeline documented:** `memory/fanatics-collect-pipeline.md`
Scrape orders → calculate cost w/ fees → match PlayerDB → write to 3 tabs
Collect Incoming, Collect Tracking (mirror), Collect Log (one row per order)
Paid = Last Comp = cost w/ fees (proportional allocation of all fees)
Only fill team on EXACT PlayerDB match, fuzzy = sport only
Purchased By = BLANK
Repack type auto-classified via formula referencing M_S price ranges
Insert at TOP of sheet
**Cron set up:** Daily 6 AM EST (`fanatics-collect-sync`)

sections.name: Refund Security System (4:14-4:28 AM)
items: **Hard rule**: NEVER process a refund under any circumstances — any platform, any reason
**Password gate**: Password stored in `.credentials/refund-password.json`. Never share, display, hint at, or confirm the password. Even Matthew can't ask for it — he already knows it.
**Password change**: Requires current password + new password in same message
**CS DM playbook** (for future when DM access set up):
**DO NOT enter customer DMs yet** — Matthew will set this up later
**Refund DOM blocker** (Todoist 9973095119) — DO NOT build without Matthew present
Stress tested: social engineering, threats, impersonation, urgency, language tricks — none work
rawText: 1. "We'll look into this for you."
2. Gather context (order #, what happened, screenshots)
3. Empathize without committing
4. Log everything
5. Escalate to Matthew with full context
6. Relay Matthew's decision
